top.title: Iran war splits older and younger conservatives - as pressure builds for Trump to find exit ramp
top.summary: More than a thousand miles from Washington, the conflict was a dominant topic of conversation at CPAC.

top.title: Gaza peace doubts deepen as attention shifts to Iran
top.summary: With the world focused on the Iran war, there is increasing uncertainty about what happens next for Gaza.

top.title: Tiger Woods charged with driving under influence after crash
top.summary: Tiger Woods, the 15-time golf major champion, is released on bail following his arrest on charges of driving under the influence following a car crash in Florida.

top.title: PS5 price hiked by £90 due to global 'pressures'
top.summary: The changes will see the recommended retail price of the PS5 rise from £479.99 to £569.99 in the UK.

top.title: Lloyds bank reveals IT glitch affected almost half a million customers
top.summary: In a letter to the Treasury Select Committee, Lloyds apologised and said some compensation had been paid.

top.title: Just Eat and Autotrader among firms investigated in fake reviews probe
top.summary: The UK's competition watchdog says it is looking at five firms in its investigation into misleading online reviews.
